primary_composite.source: PMID:34449181 (Pitt NEJM 2021; NCT02545049 CT.gov resultsSection outcome 0: CV composite HR 0.87, 95% CI 0.76-0.98; stratified Cox model; this is the primary endpoint used as primary for DFS HF subgroup analysis)

acm.source: PMID:34449181 (Pitt NEJM 2021; NCT02545049 CT.gov resultsSection outcome 3: ACM HR 0.89, 95% CI 0.77-1.04; stratified Cox model)

cv_death.source: Derived (assumption: CV death HR approximated at 0.87 matching CV composite; PMID:34449181 does not separately report CV death CI; baseline_prop 0.60 typical CV fraction; placeholder for clinician review)

non_cv_death.source: Derived from conservation law: non_cv HR = (ACM_HR - 0.60 x CV_death_HR) / 0.40 approx 0.925; CI approximate; PMID:34449181 does not separately report non-CV death; placeholder for clinician review

delta_k.source: Derived (assumption: finerenone delta-K ~+0.18 mmol/L at higher baseline eGFR (68 mL/min); lower than FIDELIO given better renal function; extrapolated from FIGARO-DKD population; PMID:34449181; placeholder for clinician review)

delta_sbp.source: Derived (assumption: ~1.5 mmHg SBP reduction; PMID:34449181 supplementary; placeholder for clinician review)

delta_egfr.source: Derived (assumption: acute eGFR dip smaller at higher baseline eGFR; PMID:34449181; placeholder for clinician review)
